dct_title_s: Map of the Oregon Territory of the United States : exhibiting the various trading depots or forts occupied by the British Hudson Bay Company, connected with the western and northwestern fur trade
dct_description_sm: published by Edwd. Hutawa, Lithographer, No.7, S. Third Street, St. Louis, Mo., Aug. 24th, 1843 ; on stone by Julius Hutawa.
Relief shown by hachures and spot heights.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Map Collections courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact Branner Earth Sciences Library & Map Collections at brannerlibrary@stanford.edu.
